versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, eligibility, generation, verification, reissue, revocation, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible certificate type, template field, verification display field, report or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.certificate_versioning: Every generation/reissue creates immutable certificate version and verification reference.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
